issues.detail: Instructions are not specific and lack unambiguous guidance for the agent.
Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Typed sentiment classifier with reasoning
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a dspy.Signature subclass with typed InputField/OutputField and uses dspy.ChainOfThought to produce reasoning plus typed outputs; baseline crafts a manual prompt string with no typed signature or ChainOfThought module.

scenarios.name: Auto-optimize a RAG pipeline with few-shot examples
scenarios.rationale: Treatment composes a dspy.Module with Retrieve + ChainOfThought and compiles it via BootstrapFewShot with a metric function and dspy.Example trainset; baseline hand-writes few-shot examples in a prompt template with no optimizer or metric-driven compile.
